# @emisso/accounting

> Double-entry accounting engine for Chilean businesses.

- Repo: https://github.com/emisso-ai/emisso-accounting
- License: MIT

## Install

npm install @emisso/accounting

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/emisso-ai/emisso-accounting/blob/main/README.md)
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/emisso-ai/emisso-accounting/blob/main/AGENTS.md)

## Packages

- @emisso/accounting — Pure engine (chart of accounts, ledger, reports, tax, XML)
- @emisso/accounting-api — REST API with Effect TS + Drizzle + PostgreSQL

## Key Features

- Double-entry ledger with append-only journal entries
- SII standard chart of accounts (hierarchical dot notation)
- Financial reports: trial balance, 8 columnas, income statement, balance sheet
- Chilean tax: IVA, PPM, CM, F29
- SII XML generation: libro diario, libro mayor, balance
- Generators: invoice, payroll, RCV to journal entries
- Integer CLP arithmetic (no floating point)
- Self-hosted REST API with multi-tenant support
